reason_for_decision: The article passes because it compares scanning architectures through revisit pattern, mechanical burden, and workflow impact, even though the ending is slightly lighter than the strongest comparison pieces.
strengths: The article explains scanning architecture through operational behavior rather than product terminology.
It handles mechanical, hybrid, sector electronic, and multi-face designs in a balanced way.
The planning questions and integration checklist make the comparison useful for engineering teams.
summary_assessment: This article is strong enough to pass under the strict rubric. It is practically useful and technically coherent, with only a slightly lighter closing structure than the strongest pieces in the set.
